globalNews.title: Oil prices hit $100 for the first time since May
globalNews.summary: The price of Brent crude rose more than 5% on Thursday as the war in the Middle East continues to escalate.

globalNews.title: Saudis must recognise Israel for nuclear deal, says Trump
globalNews.summary: The US president says the landmark agreement to help Saudis develop nuclear energy is dependent on it joining the Abraham Accords.

globalNews.title: France evacuates 20,000 as wildfires spread in south-west
globalNews.summary: Most of those evacuated were tourists from campsites around Arcachon Bay in France's Gironde region.

globalNews.title: Yemen's Houthis attack Saudi tanker as US launches more Iran strikes
globalNews.summary: The Iran-backed group, which previously announced a "maritime embargo" against Saudi Arabia, also claims to have hit another vessel.

globalNews.title: 'I am still alive': Indian activist on hunger strike for 26 days loses 11kg
globalNews.summary: Sonam Wangchuk has been the main draw at the Cockroach Janta Party (CJP) protest in Delhi.

cryptoNews.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
cryptoNews.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

cryptoNews.title: Fears of AI-driven DeFi hack epidemic overstated for now — but not for long
cryptoNews.summary: Are the fears of an AI driven hacking epidemic totally overblown, or is this just the lull before the storm?

cryptoNews.title: Strategy-led group pledges $15M to quantum-proof Bitcoin network
cryptoNews.summary: A consortium led by Strategy and BlackRock has pledged $15 million to secure the Bitcoin network from the threat of a quantum computing breakthrough.

cryptoNews.title: Binance joins STOP THE TRAFFIK in anti-human trafficking effort
cryptoNews.summary: The partnership expands Binance’s compliance efforts by providing intelligence and training to help detect cryptocurrency activity tied to human trafficking and child exploitation.

cryptoNews.title: BitMEX token crashes 90% as exchange announces shutdown
cryptoNews.summary: BitMEX’s BMEX token plunged about 90% after the exchange announced plans to shut down, ending nearly 12 years in business as its Bitcoin futures market share shrank.

aiNews.title: AI chip startup Etched defies skeptics, hits $10.3B valuation from big-name investors
aiNews.summary: Etched, founded by three Harvard dropouts, has created new chips and memory components that speed up inference on any AI model -- no GPUs required, it says.

aiNews.title: Experts say exploiting Anthropic’s Fable isn’t how Kimi K3 got so good
aiNews.summary: "I don't think you get a model this strong and this quickly on the heels of Fable doing strictly distillation," one expert told TechCrunch.

aiNews.title: ServiceNow bets $40 million on Indian banking software specialist to expand its financial services push
aiNews.summary: ServiceNow's investment gives BusinessNext a strategic partner to expand its AI-powered banking software globally.

aiNews.title: After shocking quarter, IBM insists that AI isn’t killing the mainframe
aiNews.summary: After IBM's stock crashed last week on warnings of poor mainframe sales, the CEO explained that AI wrecked corporate hardware budget, temporarily.

aiNews.title: Google justifies its massive AI spending with a booming cloud business
aiNews.summary: Google's cloud business is thriving, as companies adopting its AI and AI infrastructure services help the tech giant to report record profits.

economicCalendar.description: Federal Reserve interest rate announcement and policy statement
